title: ReFinedTools
body:
ReFinedTools is a RFTools fork with some bug fixes and changes.

Currently, the fixes and changes that this fork contains are:

- Fixed the issue where GTCEu machines don't display in the storage scanner.
- Fixed the issue where oredict matching doesn't work with GTCEu metaItems.
- (After v.7.75) Fixed the issue where crafting grids overlap with JEI. (requires McJtyLib Refilmed!)
 

ReFinedTools is for 1.12.2 only.

You can support the original auther by pleding at https://www.patreon.com/McJty

Thanks!

Please use "Issues" page to post the problems you get with the mod or if you have any suggestions to it.
